ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PER CCP 36(A) AND (D). TRIAL WILL BE SET EARLIER THAN 120 DAYS CONDITIONED ON PLAINTIFF'S AGREEMENT THAT SUMMARY MOTIONS MAY BE HEARD ON 15 DAYS NOTICE WITHOUT AN ADDITIONAL TWO DAYS FOR E-SERVICE. TRIAL IS MAY 29, 2012 AT 11:15AM IN DEPARTMENT 503. LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY MOTIONS IS MAY 17, WITH OPPOSITIONS DUE 5 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND REPLIES DUE 2 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF TO MAKE A SETTLEMENT DEMAND ON ALL DEFENDANTS NO LATER THAN APRIL 27, 2012. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN ROOM 603 AT 1:30PM ON MAY 17, 2012. TIME TO RESPOND TO WRITTEN CONTENTION DISCOVERY IS SHORTENED TO 20 DAYS. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS MAY 25, 2012. EXPERT DISCOVERY REMAINS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL DEPARTMENT. NO LATER THAN MARCH 9, 2012, PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT, THE NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS. NO LATER THAN MARCH 9, 2012, DEFENDANTS MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING THE NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF DEFENDANT'S AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. ANY PERSON NOT IDENTIFIED ON THE STATEMENTS WILL BE BARRED FROM TESTIFYING AT TRIAL OR PRESENTING A DECLARATION ON A SUMMARY MOTION ABSENT GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. THE PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING ANY OTHER SCHEDULING OR OTHER ISSUE WHICH ANY OF THEM WANT TO HAVE INCLUDED IN THE PREFERENCE ORDER. A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET ON MARCH 14, 2012 AT 2:00 P.M. IN DEPT. 503. FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE HELD ON MAY 9, 2012 AT 1:30PM. NO NEED FOR ANY PARTY TO FILE ANY CMC STATEMENT. PARTIES MAY APPEAR AT THE CONFERENCE BY TELEPHONE. PLAINTIFFS ARE ORDERED TO DISCLOSE ALL PAST AND FUTURE CLAIMS MADE TO BANKRUPTCY TRUSTS WITHIN 5 DAYS OF SUBMISSION TO THE TRUST. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, MATTER NOT REPORTED (TLJ/503)
REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON DEC-13-2012. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 503 ON MAY-29-2012 AT 11:15 AM FOR TRIAL. (503)
